india_trends.title: Petrol, diesel prices may rise ₹20 per litre in 3–6 months if crude stays above $100, says Emkay; lists stocks at risk
india_trends.summary: India’s crude basket is currently trading around $110 per barrel. At these levels, under-recoveries for OMCs are estimated at approximately ₹18–20 per litre for petrol and diesel, even after the ₹10 per litre excise duty cut announced on March 27, 2026.

india_trends.summary: Mobikwik share price rallied over 16% in Monday's trading session as investors cheered the receipt of an NBFC application from the RBI. The stock had listed in the Indian stock market in December 2024.

india_trends.title: Small-cap stock edges higher after announcement of Q4 results 2026
india_trends.summary: MIC Electronics shares rose 3% after announcing Q4FY26 results, showing a consolidated net loss of ₹18.35 crore. Despite this, revenue increased 13.3% to ₹51 crore, and EBITDA surged 60.6% to ₹13 crore, reflecting strong operational performance.
